title: Village Farms International Q3 2020 Key Earnings Numbers
text: Village Farms International reported Q3 2020 earnings with consolidated net income of $520,000 or $0.01 per share. Pure Sunfarms delivered seventh consecutive profitable quarter with net sales increased 75% sequentially to CAD 22.6 million. Pure Sunfarms net income jumped 200% sequentially to CAD 3.2 million demonstrating strong profitability. The quarter showed continued momentum in cannabis operations with retail sales growth and margin expansion. Fresh produce segment continued contributing to consolidated results with strong seasonal demand. Quarter demonstrated recovery trajectory from earlier pandemic impacts and establishing Pure Sunfarms as a significant profit driver for the company.
